title: Notice: III & IV B.Tech I Semester Class Commencement AY 2026-27
content: N.B.K.R. INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE & TECHNOLOGY (AUTONOMOUS). Notice No. B-10/2026/01, dated 17-05-2026. III & IV B.Tech. I Semester classes for the Academic Year 2026-27 commence from 06-07-2026. Tuition Fee in full, as applicable to MQ, NRTF, SPOT category students should be paid before the date of commencement of classes and complete the enrolment process for the respective classes. Early Bird Offer: Pay before 20-06-2026 and avail 10% discount on tuition fee. Payments towards Tuition Fee should be made by individually logging in to the following portal: https://portal.nbkrsac.in. Fund Transfer details should be submitted in the college office and receipts collected. Issued by the Principal, NBKR Institute of Science & Technology.
applicable_to: III and IV B.Tech students (MQ, NRTF, SPOT category)
